seo.title: African Interior Design - AI Creator & Styles Catalog
seo.description: Transform your spaces with authentic African interior design powered by AI. Explore our database of {{count}} architectural styles from the Sahel to the Coast.

landing.subtitle: Upload a photo of your room, choose from {{count}}+ authentic African styles, and let the AI transform it in seconds.

1.title: Upload your photo
1.desc: Take a photo of any room. Living room, bedroom, kitchen — everything works.

2.title: Choose an African style
2.desc: Explore {{count}}+ authentic styles: Kente, Tuareg, Swahili, Ndebele, Agadez, and much more.

3.title: AI transforms everything
3.desc: Gemini AI applies the style in seconds. Compare before/after, export a PDF, or explore in a 3D world.

4.title: Detail Editing (Inpainting)
4.desc: Paint over areas you want to modify to replace a sofa, add a painting, or adjust any specific detail.

stylesAvailable.title: 8 African design families
stylesAvailable.desc: From Saharan architecture to Ashanti royal textiles, every style is authentic and documented.

regions.title: {{count}} major cultural regions
regions.desc: Explore the architectural and decorative diversity across the continent.

inspirations.title: Latest Creations
inspirations.desc: Discover the interiors generated by the community.

cta.title: Ready to transform your interior?
cta.desc: Free, no signup required. Result in less than a minute.

footer.desc: African Interior Designer — {{styles}} styles · {{regions}} regions · {{families}} families

seo.description: Browse AI-generated African interior designs. Authenticity meets modern creativity.

seo.description: Explore 89 authentic African architectural styles with detailed cultural history and AI prompts.

ma-riad.name: Traditional Riad
ma-riad.description: Internal courtyards, colorful zellige, murmuring fountains and carved stucco — the Andalusian-Berber art of living

ma-berbere.name: Modern Berber
ma-berbere.description: Beni Ouarain diamond rugs, raw wool and Amazigh symbols in a sleek and warm setting

ma-chefchaouen.name: Chefchaouen Blue
ma-chefchaouen.description: Blue gradients, white lime and wrought iron — the serenity of the Rif mountains

tn-sidi.name: Sidi Bou Said
tn-sidi.description: Immaculate white, azure blue woodwork and moucharabiehs — the Mediterranean charm of Tunisia

eg-nubien.name: Nubian Village
eg-nubien.description: Mud brick domes, colorful wall paintings and geometric patterns — the banks of the eternal Nile

gh-ashanti.name: Royal Ashanti
gh-ashanti.description: Kente cloth, carved stools and Adinkra symbols — the grandeur of the Ashanti Kingdom

gh-adinkra.name: Minimalist Adinkra
gh-adinkra.description: Black on white symbols of wisdom, dark wood and natural linen — refined Ghanaian philosophy

ng-yoruba.name: Yoruba Adire
ng-yoruba.description: Hand-dyed indigo textiles, royal beads and teak wood — the elegance of Nigeria

ng-benin.name: Benin Bronze
ng-benin.description: Royal bronze replicas, ocher earth and woven textiles — the prestige of the ancient Kingdom of Benin

ng-hausa.name: Hausa Zaria
ng-hausa.description: Carved banco architecture, complex geometric patterns and Northern leathers — the Sahelian heritage

ml-dogon.name: Dogon Cliff
ml-dogon.description: Carved wood from Bandiagara, granary doors and dry stones — the cosmogony of Dogon country

ml-bambara.name: Bambara Bogolan
ml-bambara.description: Earth cloth, Ciwara masks and raw wood — the telluric strength of Mali

ml-djenne.name: Djenne Sudano-Sahelian
ml-djenne.description: Raw earth architecture, palm wood and soft banco — the majesty of the inland delta

ci-baoule.name: Baoule Tradition
ci-baoule.description: Kita cloth, Goli masks and ebony wood — the forest refinement of Ivory Coast

ci-senoufo.name: Senufo Poro
ci-senoufo.description: Korhogo cloths, sacred birds and dark wood — initiation and equatorial nature

bf-fassofani.name: Faso Dan Fani
bf-fassofani.description: Hand-woven cotton, graphic lines and light wood — the textile pride of Burkina Faso

bf-gurunsi.name: Painted Gurunsi
bf-gurunsi.description: Black and white wall frescoes from Tiebele, red earth and straw — Kashina architecture

sn-lebou.name: Coastal Lebou
sn-lebou.description: Driftwood, fishing nets, colorful pirogues and shells — the spirit of the Atlantic

sn-bassari.name: Bassari Mountain
sn-bassari.description: Round huts, thatched roofs and bamboo — the preserved culture of Eastern Senegal

za-ndebele.name: Mural Ndebele
za-ndebele.description: Vibrant geometric graphics, beads and symmetry — the visual identity of Esther Mahlangu

palette.title: Colors of Africa
palette.subtitle: Explore and copy palettes from {{count}} authentic African styles
palette.empty: No palette found for this search.
